description_long: This is a modern storage bed frame featuring a black and white color scheme with a slatted wooden base for mattress support. The headboard is equipped with open shelving, providing space for books or small items, and is finished in black with white shelving inserts. The bed includes built-in drawers on both sides, offering additional storage space beneath the sleeping area. The footboard is solid and matches the black finish of the frame, while the side rails and drawer fronts are white, creating a striking contrast. The overall construction appears to be a combination of engineered wood and solid wood slats, with a robust and functional design. No mattress or bedding is present, leaving the slatted support structure fully visible.
description: A modern black and white storage bed frame with open-shelf headboard, slatted wooden base, and built-in side drawers. No mattress or bedding is present, highlighting the frame's storage and shelving features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open-shelf headboard, slatted base, and two side drawers pulled out.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the headboard shelves and the slatted base, with one drawer extended.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black footboard and a partially open side drawer.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the headboard shelves, slatted base, and a different drawer extended.
